code: const TOKEN_KEY="token";const USER_KEY="auth_user";export const setToken=token=>{localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,token);};export const getToken=()=>{return localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);};export const clearToken=()=>{localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);localStorage.removeItem(USER_KEY);};export const isAuthenticated=()=>{return Boolean(getToken());};export const setCurrentUser=user=>{localStorage.setItem(USER_KEY,JSON.stringify(user));};export const getCurrentUser=()=>{try{const raw=localStorage.getItem(USER_KEY);return raw?JSON.parse(raw):null;}catch(error){return null;}};export const getCurrentUserRole=()=>{var _getCurrentUser;return((_getCurrentUser=getCurrentUser())===null||_getCurrentUser===void 0?void 0:_getCurrentUser.role)||"user";};export const isAdmin=()=>{return getCurrentUserRole()==="admin";};
